a.label: Conjugate embedding labels u_i, gamma_i, beta_i, delta_i
a.standard_term: Galois conjugates under the embeddings of a degree-n field into its Galois closure

b.label: sign group H_sign = (C_2)^k
b.standard_term: elementary abelian 2-group of sign changes on the k radical generators (hyperoctahedral sign group)

evidence.label: Augmented channel vector
evidence.summary:
The augmented channel vector is

```text
(u_i,gamma_i,delta_i).
```

Its normal closure has group `C_2^3 wreath S_5`.

evidence.label: Faithful signed-permutation representation into C_2^2 wreath
evidence.summary: Every element of Gal(H_tilde/F) restricts to a permutation sigma in S_5 of the mass roots and acts on the quadratic generators by sqrt(u_i) -> +/- sqrt(u_{sigma(i)}), sqrt(gamma_i) -> +/- sqrt(gamma_{sigma(i)}). This giv

evidence.label: J=0 is a Kummer relation divisor, not a branch divisor
evidence.summary:
```text
v_J(u_i)=v_J(gamma_i)=v_J(delta_i)=0                    (11.1)
```

because

```text
delta_i(0)=gamma_i-4P != 0.
```
